sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Click the yellow 4x4 square at top center [3, 30]
result = action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 4, 'col': 31}])
print(f"Click yellow: {result}")
print(f"Level completed: {result.get('level_completed')}")
print(f"Game over: {result.get('game_over')}")

seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("\nMagenta squares:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'M' and n['pixels'] == 4:
        print(f"  boundary={n['boundary']}")
print("\nBlue circle:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'b' and n['pixels'] > 10:
        print(f"  pixels={n['pixels']}")
print("\nWhite bar:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'W':
        print(f"  pixels={n['pixels']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
